title: polanisia dodecandra subsp. trachysperma
intro: Polanisia dodecandra subsp. trachysperma, also known as the 'sticky Jim', is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating conditions like wounds, skin infections, and fever. Herbal preparations of Polanisia dodecandra subsp. trachysperma often include infusions, decoctions, and ointments that are applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
